---
title: SoSe 26
---

## Schedule

```{=html}
<iframe width="780" height="440" src="https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQc_LoqickWnJzEplAoBgLHiGvGZfgAqExVA5U2J3GzEWOZ6Y2cl09CuV2lUB7tLOe5HA8zAEHC243O/pubhtml"></iframe>
```

## Courses 

* [CG](./cg/index.qmd)
* [FP](./fp/index.qmd)
* [TT](./type/index.qmd)

## Projects

* [thesis](./thesis/index.qmd)
